## OpenSpec Change

- **Name**: `<type>-<description>`
- **Status**: `proposed`
- **Artifacts**:
  - [ ] proposal.md
  - [ ] design.md
  - [ ] specs/ (new or modified)
  - [ ] tasks.md

<!-- What aspects should reviewers pay special attention to? -->

## Issues Addressed

<!-- Link to any related issues -->

## Checklist

- [ ] proposal.md includes "Known Issues Addressed" section (if applicable)
- [ ] proposal.md includes "Non-goals" section
- [ ] design.md addresses all requirements from referenced specs
- [ ] specs follow writing guidelines (user perspective, WHEN/THEN/AND format)
- [ ] tasks are broken into chunks of max 2 hours
- [ ] All artifact schemas are valid (`npx openspec validate --changes`)
- [ ] No implementation code is included in this PR
